name: diverter
description: Suggest one specialist subagent lineup before complex Codex work and preserve role settings across execution backends.

interface.shortDescription: Suggest one specialist lineup before complex Codex work
interface.longDescription: Advises when a Codex task benefits from specialist subagents, waits for approval, and preserves bundled role settings when native spawning is unavailable.
defaultPrompt: Check whether this task should use a specialist subagent lineup.
